name: Woodworking
tagline: Build something with your own hands

seo.title: Best Beginner Woodworking Kit UK 2025 | KitUp
seo.description: Start woodworking with the right tools. Honest beginner recommendations for hand tools and power tools with Amazon UK links.
keywords: what tools do I need to start woodworking UK

intro: Woodworking is incredibly satisfying but the sheer number of tools available is daunting. Here's the focused starter set that covers 90% of beginner projects.

kits.label: Starter Kit
kits.description: The essential hand tools to build your first projects safely.

products.name: Stanley FatMax Hand Tool Set (8 Piece)
products.description: Includes hammer, chisels, mallet, marking gauge, and square. Everything needed for basic joinery and finishing.
products.why_we_picked: Stanley FatMax tools have excellent build quality for the price and are widely trusted in the UK. A proper hand tool set teaches you the fundamentals before adding power tools.

products.name: Bosch PSR 1440 LI Cordless Drill
products.description: A reliable cordless drill/driver with enough torque for wood drilling and screw driving. Two-speed gearbox for control.
products.why_we_picked: A cordless drill is the most-used tool in any woodworker's shop. The Bosch PSR 1440 hits the right balance of power, weight, and price for beginners.

products.name: Silverline Workbench (79cm)
products.description: A sturdy folding workbench with a built-in vice. Folds flat for storage — essential if you're working in a garage or small space.
products.why_we_picked: Working on the floor or kitchen table is a recipe for frustration and injury. A workbench with a vice changes everything — it's the foundation of your workshop.

products.name: Safety Glasses + Dust Mask Combo
products.description: Basic PPE for any woodworking project. Eye protection and dust filtering are non-negotiable when cutting, sanding, or drilling.
products.why_we_picked: Safety first isn't a cliché — wood dust and flying chips are genuine hazards. This combo kit covers your eyes and lungs for the cost of a coffee.

kits.label: Level Up Kit
kits.description: Add these tools when you're ready to tackle bigger, more precise projects.

products.name: Bosch PST 700 E Jigsaw
products.description: A jigsaw lets you cut curves, shapes, and patterns that a handsaw can't manage. Opens up furniture and decorative projects.
products.why_we_picked: The jigsaw is the most versatile power tool for beginner woodworkers after a drill. The Bosch PST 700 is light, accurate, and simple to use.

products.name: Bosch Random Orbit Sander
products.description: A random orbit sander produces a smooth finish without sanding marks. Far faster than hand sanding for any project larger than a small box.
products.why_we_picked: The finish is what separates amateur and professional woodwork. An orbital sander makes achieving a smooth, paint-ready surface genuinely easy.

faqs.question: Hand tools or power tools for a complete beginner?
faqs.answer: Start with hand tools — they teach you to understand wood grain, joinery, and technique. A cordless drill is the only power tool you truly need at first. Add power tools as your projects demand them.

faqs.question: What's the best first woodworking project?
faqs.answer: A simple box or shelf is the classic first project. It involves measuring, cutting, drilling, and joining — all the fundamentals — without complex joinery. There are hundreds of free plans online.

faqs.question: Do I need a workshop to start woodworking?
faqs.answer: No — a garage, garden, or even a kitchen is fine for hand tool work. A folding workbench with a vice is essential. Power tools that generate fine dust are best used outdoors or in a well-ventilated space.

faqs.question: What wood should a beginner use?
faqs.answer: Pine is cheap, widely available, and easy to cut and join — ideal for learning. Avoid hardwoods like oak until you're comfortable with your tools. Timber merchants and B&Q both sell pine in standard sizes.
